flavorText: Illusionists bend perception, creating convincing deceptions and temporary realities.

features.description: The gold and time to copy Illusion spells into your spellbook are halved.
You learn Minor Illusion if you do not already know it, and you can create both sound and image with one casting.
When concentrating on an illusion spell, you can use your action to alter the illusion's nature within the spell's limits.
As a reaction when attacked, interpose an illusory duplicate and cause one attack to miss you. Usable once per short rest.
Once per turn, make one non-creature object in an illusion spell real for 1 minute.

illusionist-illusion-savant.summary: Your spellbook growth rewards committing to deception, sensory control, and trickery.

illusionist-improved-minor-illusion.summary: Your baseline illusion cantrip becomes a real creative tool instead of a tiny novelty.

illusionist-malleable-illusions.summary: Adapt active illusions on the fly so they keep pace with a changing scene.

illusionist-illusory-self.summary: Project a false self at the key moment so an attack or threat is wasted on the wrong target.

illusionist-illusory-reality.summary: For a brief moment, part of your illusion stops being fake and starts affecting the world for real.
illusionist-illusory-reality.description: Illusory Reality is the late-game payoff for a creative illusionist. It rewards players who think spatially and use trickery as a problem-solving engine rather than only as decoration.
